args: SECRETS_DIR="${CODEX_SECRETS_DIR:-${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/secrets}"; SECRET_FILE="$SECRETS_DIR/vibe-trading.env"; if [ -f "$SECRET_FILE" ]; then set -a; source "$SECRET_FILE"; set +a; fi; UVX="$(command -v uvx || true)"; if [ -z "$UVX" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/uvx" ]; then UVX="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/uvx"; fi; if [ -z "$UVX" ]; then echo "uvx not found" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$UVX" --from vibe-trading-ai vibe-trading-mcp
